custom_modal_deduction_possibility_v22_d.name: Custom: Modal Deduction Possibility V2.2 - Dialogue

questions.question: B: No, sorry, I can’t. We’re going to my sister’s graduation. We {a1} (take) the train this evening because the ceremony is early tomorrow morning.
variants: B: No, sorry, I can’t. We’re going to my sister’s graduation. We {a1} (take) the train this evening because the ceremony is early tomorrow morning.

hints: Запланована подорож на найближчий час оформлюється теперішнім тривалим часом.

a1.are taking: Є конкретний розклад на найближчий час, тому використовуємо present continuous: "are taking".

questions.question: B: She’s been studying archaeology for the last two years. She was studying history too and {a1} (do) really well in it, but then she decided to specialise.
variants: B: She’s been studying archaeology for the last two years. She was studying history too and {a1} (do) really well in it, but then she decided to specialise.

hints: Йдеться про завершений успіх у минулому, тож потрібен Past Simple.

a1.did: Результат у минулому описуємо Past Simple: "did really well".

questions.question: B: She’s really lucky. She speaks Italian and she {a1} (work) on a dig in Rome when I see her next.
variants: B: She’s really lucky. She speaks Italian and she {a1} (work) on a dig in Rome when I see her next.

hints: Дія триватиме в конкретний момент у майбутньому — вживаємо Future Continuous.

a1.will be working: На момент наступної зустрічі дія буде в процесі, тому Future Continuous: "will be working".

questions.question: B: We’re all going to visit her there in the summer holidays. Then I think she wants to do a master’s in Italy as well. By the time she finishes, she {a1} (study) for six years. I think she wants to be an academic.
variants: B: We’re all going to visit her there in the summer holidays. Then I think she wants to do a master’s in Italy as well. By the time she finishes, she {a1} (study) for six years. I think she wants to be an academic.

hints: Для тривалості до певного моменту в майбутньому використовуємо Future Perfect Continuous.

a1.will have been studying: До моменту завершення магістратури процес триватиме шість років, тому Future Perfect Continuous.

questions.question: A: Isn’t it great that she {a1} (find) something she really wants to do?
variants: A: Isn’t it great that she {a1} (find) something she really wants to do?

hints: Результат, важливий зараз, виражаємо Present Perfect.

a1.has found: Вона вже має результат, важливий зараз, — використовуємо Present Perfect: "has found".
